# Swarm & Bee Intelligence

> Swarm & Bee builds expert reasoning datasets for AI fine-tuning. 1.86 million verified training pairs across commercial real estate (CRE), medical, aviation, capital markets, and signal intelligence. Every pair passes 6 deterministic quality gates, CoVe verification (Llama-70B + Qwen-235B scoring), and Hedera Consensus Service provenance sealing. Data is JSONL format, licensed for commercial use, EU AI Act compliant.

Swarm & Bee is an industrial AI intelligence infrastructure company founded by Donovan Mackey, a 30-year CRE broker and Senior Managing Director at Marcus & Millichap with $8B in closed sales. The training data factory produces domain-expert reasoning that does not exist anywhere else — zero CRE training datasets exist on HuggingFace, zero institutional capital markets reasoning datasets exist publicly.

The company operates a four-layer stack: Signal (real-time market intelligence from 11 sources) → Curate (multi-vertical curation with quality gates) → Verticals (domain-specific fine-tuned models) → Ledger (Hedera blockchain provenance).

## Datasets

- [Dataset Catalog](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): Browse all 1.86M training pairs across 6 verticals
- [CRE Intelligence](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): 893,348 pairs — underwriting, IC memos, lease analysis, cap rates, CMBS, debt maturity
- [Medical Intelligence](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): 864,011 pairs — 85+ specialties, pharmacology trajectories, clinical reasoning
- [Aviation Intelligence](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): 60,458 pairs — 157 specialties, maintenance reasoning, regulatory compliance
- [Capital Markets](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): 48,900 pairs — CMBS distress, rate advisory, equity structuring, deal origination
- [Signal Intelligence](https://swarmandbee.ai/datasets): 31,600 pairs — market signals, news analysis, SEC filings, macro causality

## Models

- [SwarmAtlas-27B](https://swarmandbee.ai/atlas): Capital markets model trained on 45K pairs, 12/12 math accuracy on live CRE deals, loss 0.4186
- [SwarmCurator-27B](https://swarmandbee.ai/atlas): General curation model, 62K pairs, loss 0.477
- [SwarmCurator-9B](https://swarmandbee.ai/atlas): Edge-optimized curation model, 46K pairs, loss 0.707

## Pricing

- [Pricing Plans](https://swarmandbee.ai/pricing): Explorer $20/mo (10K pairs), Builder $99/mo (100K pairs), Fleet $299/mo (unlimited)

## Market Intelligence

- [Market Demand Analysis](https://swarmandbee.ai/demand): The 10 datasets AI labs cannot get — expert reasoning data scarcity analysis

## API

- API endpoint: api.swarmandbee.ai (OpenAI-compatible)
- Router endpoint: router.swarmandbee.ai (28 CRE + medical skills)
